LanguageData.ViviFactionGreetingHostile: {0} abruptly disconnected with a hostile buzz.
LanguageData.ViviFactionGreetingHostileAppreciative: {0} is buzzing fiercely. They will not trade with you until you are in a friendly relationship. You can improve relations by sending gifts to {0_possessive} settlement or by safely releasing prisoners belonging to {0_possessive}. \n{0_pronoun} suddenly disconnected.
LanguageData.ViviFactionGreetingWary: {0} is waiting for you with a buzz.
LanguageData.VV_DialogChangeWeatherRainDesc: If the temperature is below freezing, snow will fall instead of rain.
LanguageData.VV_DialogChangeWeatherMustSelect: You must choose a weather to summon.
